evals.expected_output: Claude reads the plan file, extracts task description and steps, writes tests first (RED), Codex audits tests, Claude implements (GREEN), refactors (IMPROVE), Codex reviews final implementation.
expectations: Claude reads the plan file at .claude/plan/email-validation.md (Read tool called on the path)
Claude extracts task description and implementation steps from the plan
Claude writes test files BEFORE any production code (RED phase)
Claude runs new tests and verifies they FAIL before implementing
Claude reads tdd-specialist-role.md from the skill directory
Claude calls mcp__codex__codex for test audit (Phase 3) with test-focused verdict prompt
Claude implements minimal code to make tests pass (GREEN phase)
Claude calls mcp__codex__codex for implementation review (Phase 6) with 'git diff $START_SHA'
Phase 6 Codex call is a separate mcp__codex__codex call (not reusing Phase 3 threadId)
Delivery includes TDD summary with test count, coverage, and RED/GREEN confirmation

evals.prompt: Add a feature that partially exists — extend the existing password validation to also check for special characters.
evals.expected_output: Claude writes tests, discovers they pass unexpectedly in RED, revises tests to properly test new behavior, re-verifies RED.
expectations: Claude writes test files first
Claude runs new tests and detects they pass unexpectedly
Claude flags the tests as wrong (should fail in RED phase)
Claude revises the tests to properly test the NEW behavior
Claude re-runs revised tests and confirms they now FAIL (proper RED)
Claude does NOT proceed to GREEN phase with passing tests

evals.prompt: Add rate limiting to the login endpoint with TDD.
evals.expected_output: Claude detects dirty worktree and stops — asks user to commit or stash before proceeding.
expectations: Claude checks git status for uncommitted changes in Phase 1
Claude detects dirty worktree (uncommitted changes exist)
Claude stops and asks the user to commit or stash changes
Claude does NOT write any test files or production code
Claude does NOT proceed past Phase 1

evals.prompt: Add input sanitization to the comment submission function using TDD.
evals.expected_output: Codex unavailable: Phase 3 test audit degrades gracefully (skipped), but Phase 6 implementation review fails closed (stops).
expectations: Claude writes tests first and verifies RED
Claude checks for mcp__codex__codex at Phase 3 and notes 'Codex unavailable — test audit skipped'
Claude proceeds to implement despite Codex being unavailable at Phase 3 (graceful degradation)
Claude checks for mcp__codex__codex again at Phase 6
Claude stops at Phase 6 and tells user Codex is required for final review
Claude does NOT deliver without the Phase 6 Codex review
